basic_details.job_title: DCPU Gopalganj Support Person Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Child Protection Unit Gopalganj (DCPU Gopalganj)
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Gopalganj (DCPU Gopalganj) Support Person Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website gopalganj.bih.nic.in. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced for the Support Person post through the DCPU Gopalganj Support Person Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 30 years Maximum Age: 65 years Age Limit as on 01 June 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Social Work (MSW)/Sociology/Psychology/Child Development or Law or Graduate with Diploma in Child Rights/Counseling with 3 years experience
qualification.details: Support Person: Post Graduate in Social Work (MSW)/Sociology/Psychology/Child Development or Law or Graduate with Diploma in Child Rights/Counseling with 3 years experience in child rights/child protection/legal work/child psychology/counseling/sociology/psychology.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://gopalganj.bih.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download DCPU Gopalganj Support Person Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DCPU Gopalganj Support Person Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.district_child_protection_unit_gopalganj: Post Graduate in Social Work (MSW)/Sociology/Psychology/Child Development or Law or Graduate with Diploma in Child Rights/Counseling with 3 years experience

content_sections.heading: DCPU Gopalganj Support Person Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DCPU Gopalganj Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DCPU Gopalganj Support Person Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DCPU Gopalganj Support Person Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Support Person: Post Graduate in Social Work (MSW)/Sociology/Psychology/Child Development or Law or Graduate with Diploma in Child Rights/Counseling with 3 years experience in child rights/child protection/legal work/child psychology/counseling/sociology/psychology.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 30 years Maximum Age: 65 years Age Limit as on 01 June 2026.

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Evaluation (80 marks: Graduation 50, Post Graduation 20, PhD 10) Interview (20 marks)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://gopalganj.bih.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DCPU Gopalganj Support Person Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Gopalganj Support Person recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DCPU Gopalganj Support Person posts is 18th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Support Person post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate degree in Social Work (MSW), Sociology, Psychology, Child Development, or Law. Alternatively, a Graduate degree with a Diploma in Child Rights or Counseling, along with a minimum of 3 years of relevant experience, is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Support Person position?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Support Person post is 30 years, and the maximum age limit is 65 years. The age will be calculated as of 01 June 2026.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Support Person post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies announced for the Support Person post by the District Child Protection Unit Gopalganj.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Support Person role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Support Person position is offered on a per-case basis, amounting to Rs. 9000/- per case.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the DCPU Gopalganj Support Person recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an evaluation stage worth 80 marks (based on Graduation, Post Graduation, and PhD) and an interview stage worth 20 marks. The final selection will be based on the total marks obtained.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the DCPU Gopalganj Support Person recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the Support Person position?
faq.answer: The Support Person position is a contractual job. Candidates will be appointed on a contract basis for the duration specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Child Protection Unit Gopalganj, which is https://gopalganj.bih.nic.in. Links are also provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
